title: SkillForge adoption (real-world test) and TODO-prefix import handling

acceptance_criteria.text: A third independent real adopter (SkillForge Academy, a Tauri app) runs the full lifecycle adopt -> import-plan -> doctor to a conformant RepoPact, non-destructively (existing AGENTS.md/todos/tracking/audits preserved).
import-plan tolerates flat tracker-prefixed todo files: `_split_num` strips a leading TODO-/TASK-/ISSUE- prefix (TODO-001-foo -> 001/foo); regression-tested.
